rationale: Use the PGx search and detail surfaces before collecting literature for multi-gene drug-response evidence.

ladder.what_it_gives: CPIC drug-gene rows for known pharmacogenes.

ladder.command: biomcp get pgx warfarin recommendations annotations
biomcp search article --drug warfarin -k "CYP2C9 VKORC1 dose response" --limit 10
ladder.what_it_gives: Focused literature for the major pharmacogenes and dose response.
Batch article details for key supporting papers.
